/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DOPC/X:(LOVE WAIVER)/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:  NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 06-23-22/X: BAIL SET AT $15,000/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:DEFENDANT ARRIVED LATE TO COURT,  THE BENCH WARRANT ISSUED IN THE MORNING HAS BEEN RECALLED/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/SAWD/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORINGBY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORINGDEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT IMMEDIATELY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/INTC/X:(LOVE WAIVER)/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN FTA PHC 01-19-22/X:LOVE WAIVER/BWDNC/INTR/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PHC (TO SET)/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:LOVE WAIVER AS TO THE 10TH DAY OF 12-29-21, HOWEVER THE 60TH DAY IS MAINTAINED/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDEREDAND STAYED TO01-12-22/X: BAIL SET AT $15,000/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:12-29-21/X:THE60TH LAST DAY IS 02-14-22/ACM/X:DEFENDANT IS TO CHECK IN 4X PER WEEK/X:ASA CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND ISORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD ANDBY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UPWITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:DEFENDANT SHALL NOT POSSES BURGLAR TOOLS/X:DEFENDANT HAS A CURFEW AND IS TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN THEINTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE DURING THE FOLLOWING HOURS 8PM TO 6AM/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/INTC/BWDNC/ACM/CONTD: PRE HEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1HR/
